name: Chocolate Chip Pecan Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease an 8 x 8 x 2-inch (2 L) pan with Golden Crisco shortening. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the Golden Crisco shortening, sugar, Egg, milk, and vanilla until well blended. Reduce speed to low. Add flour and stir in one cup of chocolate chips and half a cup of chopped pecans. Spread mixture into the prepared pan.
3. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned. Remove from oven and sprinkle with one cup of chocolate chips. Allow to cool for about 5 minutes, or until chips are softened. Spread evenly and sprinkle with the remaining half a cup of chopped pecans. Cool completely before cutting into 2 x 2-inch (5 cm x 5 cm) squares.
Hint: Semi-sweet chocolate chips can be used in place of milk chocolate. Makes: 16 squares
Preparation Time: 15 minutes. Baking Time: 25 to 30 minutes
